title: Full catalog entries for top ~10 authenticated Ewing lines
context: After the pilot, the project catalogues the top ~10 authenticated Ewing lines that pass the gate (drawn from MODEL-ROSTER.md). The specific set is determined by gate triage, not pre-enumerated, so this remains a representative scale-out task rather than a fan-out across named lines. Standing guardrails bind this task: open-access sources only (no dbGaP/EGA/biobank/controlled-access); COSMIC/OncoKB are link-only; donor fields are published-only with no re-identification or external linkage; every assertion carries field-level provenance; the deliverable is de-identified research metadata, never patient data and never a clinical/therapeutic recommendation.
objective: Catalogue the top ~10 authenticated Ewing lines (gate-passed, from the roster) as complete field-level-provenanced entries.
acceptanceCriteria: 10+ models fully catalogued at >= 90/100, each with committed gate artifact and full field-level provenance.
Identity resolved across all three ID systems for each; authentication status present; cross-source disagreements shown with provenance (not silently resolved).
No NC/controlled data redistributed; deliverable dataset licensed CC-BY-4.0; domain + license reviewers signed off.
Lines are selected from gate-passed MODEL-ROSTER.md candidates (roster-008); the concrete set is gate-determined, not fabricated.
resources: ICLAC Register of Misidentified Cell Lines
output: catalog/ entries for 10+ authenticated Ewing lines (dataset), each with committed gate artifact.
